series_metadata.series_description: This series contains original documents, paper and electronic media, for the Ohio Bicentennial Commission project. Documents include: OBC Final Report, OBC computer backup disks, Agreements & Contracts, Legal Lease & Partners Information, Advisory Councils project and correspondence files, Legacy & Signature Grants, (6)Regional Offices''''''''program and correspondence files, Calendars, Traveling Exhibit, Smithsonian Folk Life Festival, Bell Castings, Barn Paintings, Corporate Limit Markers, Merchandising, Logo, Trademark and Copy Right Licensing, and Commemorative Bicentennial Quarter/Coin Design submissions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain and transferred to State Archives for their retention or destruction., Paper: Archives
